summary: Built the Security capability with three components: inbound gate (adversarial prompt injection detection via 17 regex patterns + PII filter for SSN/CC/phone with configurable sensitivity levels), audit writer (SHA-256 hash-verified immutable entries to office.db), and config.yaml (runtime-loaded detection rules). All 5 scenarios pass — adversarial blocking, PII redaction, clean passthrough, audit hash verification, and sensitivity level control.
decisions: Used parents[4] for path resolution in audit/writer.py (4 levels deep from workspace root)
17 adversarial detection patterns covering prompt injection, jailbreak, social engineering, roleplay, override attempts
PII filter uses 3 pattern types (SSN, credit card, US phone) with configurable redaction labels
broadcast: Audit writer API: log_audit(capability, employee, action, channel, counterparty, metadata) -> uuid. Import from Zoffice.capabilities.security.audit.writer. All capabilities MUST call this for every action.
